title: [CI:DOCS] Remove experimental mac tutorial
body:
This doc is no longer applicable.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

```release-note
none
```

We need to remove the link from there as well.
